details.description: Daytime view of the Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay. Several towering artificial ‘supertrees’ with burgundy-red steel lattice canopies and pale green cores rise above dense tropical planting. Their trunks are clad with vertical gardens of vines and epiphytes; one has a circular catwalk ring around it. The sky is bright with scattered clouds. At left, the three hotel towers and ship‑like rooftop of Marina Bay Sands (the SkyPark) are visible behind the trees. In the distance, faint spokes of the Singapore Flyer can be seen through the foliage. A small tethered promotional balloon sits near the palms in the lower center. Overall lighting suggests clear, sunny conditions and a ground-level vantage within the park.

details.description: The image shows the iconic Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore. Several towering vertical garden structures with intricate purple-metal branch canopies rise from lush green bases, creating a dramatic skyline against a bright blue sky. To the left, a portion of the Marina Bay Sands hotel with its distinctive three-tower silhouette and the connectingSkyPark is visible. The scene appears to be taken from ground level among the surrounding greenery, capturing the scale of the Supertrees and the adjacent urban landmark.

details.description: A low-angle, daytime photograph capturing the iconic Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore. Several massive Supertrees dominate the frame, characterized by their concrete cores wrapped in vertical gardens and spreading, funnel-shaped metal canopies that mimic tree branches. To the left, the Marina Bay Sands hotel is clearly visible, featuring its three sloping towers and the boat-shaped SkyPark cantilevered across the top. In the background, partially obscured by the Supertree structures, the Singapore Flyer observation wheel can be seen. A white tethered balloon branded with the 'Hendrick's Gin' logo floats near the base of the trees in the lower center. The scene is set against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, and natural tree foliage frames the upper right corner.

details.description: A low-angle shot featuring several iconic Supertrees in the Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay, Singapore. These vertical gardens are characterized by their large, tree-like steel structures covered in climbing plants and topped with wide, flared canopies of intricate metal latticework. In the background to the left, the distinctive three-towered Marina Bay Sands hotel with its cantilevered SkyPark is visible. A white promotional balloon with 'Hendrick's' branding is positioned in the foreground. The Singapore Flyer Ferris wheel can be seen in the distance between the structures. The scene is set against a bright blue sky with scattered cirrus clouds, surrounded by lush tropical foliage.

details.description: Daytime view of the Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay, Singapore. Several towering, tree‑like steel structures with red branching canopies rise above dense tropical greenery; their trunks are clad with vertical gardens of vines and epiphytes. At left, the three towers of Marina Bay Sands with the boat‑shaped SkyPark are visible. In the distance behind the supertrees, the circular outline of the Singapore Flyer observation wheel can be seen. Blue sky with scattered clouds overhead; a park setting with trees in the foreground.

entities.name: Supertree Grove
entities.notes: Iconic cluster of 18 man‑made ‘supertrees’ (approx. 25–50 m tall) at Gardens by the Bay; steel frames support living vertical gardens and some incorporate photovoltaic cells and exhaust functions. Opened 2012; masterplan by Grant Associates.

entities.name: Gardens by the Bay
entities.notes: Major nature park on reclaimed land at Marina Bay, Singapore; opened 2012, featuring themed gardens, conservatories, and the Supertree Grove.

entities.name: Marina Bay Sands
entities.notes: Integrated resort designed by Moshe Safdie, opened 2010; three hotel towers topped by the ship‑like SkyPark visible at left.

entities.name: Marina Bay Sands SkyPark
entities.notes: Boat‑shaped rooftop park and observation deck spanning the three towers of Marina Bay Sands.

entities.name: Singapore Flyer
entities.notes: Large observation wheel at Marina Bay, about 165 m tall; opened 2008; visible in the background behind the supertrees.

entities.name: OCBC Skyway (walkway)
entities.notes: Elevated walkway linking two supertrees (about 22 m high, ~128 m long); a section of the ring platform is visible around one supertree.

details.description: A daytime photograph taken at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore, showcasing multiple Supertree Grove structures. These are tall, tree-like towers with spine-like red metal frames that branch out at the top to form cantilevered canopies, supporting vertical gardens along their trunks. The towers vary in height and are connected by elevated walkways. In the foreground, lush greenery frames the scene and a large white spherical sculpture with a crest sits near the base. To the left, part of the Marina Bay Sands hotel is visible, emphasizing the urban park setting. The sky is bright blue with light, wispy clouds, giving a vivid contrast to the architectural forms and greenery.

details.description: A cluster of giant Supertrees in Gardens by the Bay, Singapore. The towers feature red-purple steel lattice canopies that spread outward from green vertical gardens along thick trunks, creating a dramatic, tree-like silhouette. In the background to the left, the Marina Bay Sands hotel with its three towers and a horizontal SkyPark connects them. A white spherical sculpture sits at ground level among the greenery. Distant pedestrian structures spanning the bay hint at the Helix Bridge, set against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

details.description: A low-angle, daytime photograph capturing the iconic Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore. Several massive Supertrees dominate the frame, characterized by their reddish-purple metal exoskeletons, funnel-shaped canopies, and trunks covered in vertical gardens of lush greenery. To the far left, the Marina Bay Sands hotel is clearly visible, showcasing its three towers and the cantilevered SkyPark. In the lower central foreground, a large white balloon branded with the 'Hendrick's Gin' logo floats near the base of the trees. In the background on the right, the structure of the Singapore Flyer ferris wheel is partially visible between the Supertrees. The sky is a vibrant blue with scattered white clouds, and natural tree branches frame the upper right corner.

details.description: Daytime view of the Supertree Grove at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore. Several towering, tree‑like steel frames clad with vertical gardens rise above lush landscaping, each crowned by a wide, red lattice canopy against a bright blue, lightly clouded sky. At left in the background are the three towers and ship‑shaped SkyPark of Marina Bay Sands. A large observation wheel is faintly visible behind the grove (likely the Singapore Flyer). Foreground foliage and a streetlight frame the scene, and a tethered promotional balloon sits near the trees.

details.description: A wide-angle outdoor scene in Singapore's Gardens by the Bay showing the iconic Supertree Grove. Tall, tree-like structures with red lattice branches rise from green, plant-covered trunks, their canopies spreading outward in a fan-like silhouette against a bright blue sky with light clouds. In the background to the left, the Marina Bay Sands hotel is visible with its distinctive horizontal skybridge roof. A white spherical balloon with branding sits in the foreground among lush tropical vegetation, lending a sense of scale to the futuristic arboreal structures.
